idea-plugin.name: keyflip
idea-plugin.description:
Thin companion for the keyflip CLI — manage multiple Claude accounts from your JetBrains IDE.

The IDE's Claude integration shares the CLI's credential store, so a keyflip switch already applies to it — this plugin is convenience UI on top of the CLI. It never handles tokens itself; it only reads keyflip --json and runs the documented switch / rebind / panel commands.

  • Status bar — the active CLI account at a glance; warns when the desktop app is on a different account than the CLI. Click to switch.
  • Claude Accounts tool window — every saved account with its quota; double-click to switch.
  • Switch Claude Account, Re-link Chat History, Open Dashboard, Show Account Status actions (Tools menu).

Set the binary location in Settings/Preferences › Tools › keyflip if it is not on PATH.
idea-plugin.change-notes: • 0.3.0 — initial JetBrains port, mirroring the VS Code companion.

action.description: Pick a saved Claude account and switch to it.
Show the CLI account, desktop app and active provider.
Re-link this project's Claude chat history after moving its folder.
Open the keyflip local dashboard in an integrated terminal.
Re-query keyflip for the status bar and accounts tool window.
